name: Oakland Art & Indie Market
bio: A curated indie maker market featuring 80+ Bay Area artists, live music, and small-batch food vendors.

name: TreasureFest
bio: Monthly outdoor festival featuring hundreds of local vendors, gourmet food trucks, live music, and panoramic city views.

name: Sunday Streets Mission
bio: A car-free community street fair celebrating the Mission District with music, performances, art, and activities for all ages.

name: Quartz Oakland
address: 1121 64th Street, Oakland, CA 94608, United States of America
bio: A vibrant, queer-friendly marketplace spotlighting local artists and makers. Discover one-of-a-kind handmade goods, art prints, and jewelry in a supportive and welcoming community. Perfect for finding unique gifts and connecting with Oakland’s creative scene.

name: Castro Art Mart
bio: Performances, drag shows; requires Artyhood account to register.

name: Telegraph Holiday Fair
bio: A beloved Berkeley holiday tradition, transforming Telegraph Avenue into a festive open-air market. Shop from dozens of artisans selling gifts, crafts, and seasonal treats. Enjoy live music, street performers, and the warm holiday spirit.

name: SJ Made Events
bio: Organizer with multiple events (summer, holiday, etc.). Tends toward anime/kawaii vendors.

name: Mini Art Mart
bio: A cozy monthly market nestled inside the Kinokuniya Mall, where Japanese-inspired local artists bring unique handmade creations to the heart of SF’s Japantown. Find everything from anime art prints to handcrafted accessories in a welcoming cultural setting.
